title: tetrandra glabra
intro: Tetrandra glabra, also known as Indian tinospora, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, classified under the family Menispermaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Tetrandra glabra include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Tetrandra glabra is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, and it is also used in various Ayurvedic formulations to promote overall well-being.
